title: Traditional Ukrainian Pork Dumplings
description: A hearty Ukrainian dish featuring rich and fluffy pork dumplings made with love and care.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine ground pork, salt, and black pepper.
Add the egg and mix well to combine.
Gradually add the flour and water, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for about 10 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Spoon a small amount of the pork mixture onto the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 5-7 minutes.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite toppings.
